MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Samiere of Cashmere Law Group telephone number 415-710-5859 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted, no opposition. Sanctions denied. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
